arts.ttl: BREAKING: Mikel Arteta sticks with controversial Arsenal plan as Nottingham Forest call made
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta takes his Arsenal side to Nottingham Forest on Wednesday night as he looks to get his side's season back on track following Saturday's defeat to West Ham

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Ruben Amorim makes call on star Man Utd are ‘losing patience with’ for Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has confirmed his team for the crucial Premier League fixture with Nottingham Forest as the Red Devils bid to climb the table

arts.ttl: How to watch Forest vs Arsenal? TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: The Magpies enjoyed a 4-3 away win over Nuno Espirito Santo's side, who have now lost each of their last two Premier League games . Forest versus Arsenal will be shown live on TNT Sports 2 in the United Kingdom, with television coverage starting at 6:30pm.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak set for £150m transfer audition that could have major impact on Arsenal move
arts.sum: The Magpies have slapped a reported £150million asking price amid Arsenal and Liverpool's plans to invest in their attack for next season. "It's an understatement to say he's in fine form," Slot said ahead of the Premier League game.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright predicts Arsenal could lose Bukayo Saka and two others in 'Liverpool situation'
arts.sum: Pointing to a scenario echoing Liverpool's recent contract dilemmas, Wright said: "When you're talking about renewals with certain players, Saka, Gabriel [Magalhaes], Saliba, the way they're moving now, I bet those renewals are all going to be slow. If I'm one of these players, and their teams are going to be saying, 'Let's wait and see, we've got two years left so let's wait and see who they get in the summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal identify new sporting director behind £113m mega transfer after Mikel Arteta request
arts.sum: Former Atletico Madrid sporting director Andrea Berta is another linked with the role, and reports in Spain claim that move is starting to build up traction. “We have the sporting director which is Jason, it’s clear and he’s been since the departure of Edu from day one he has been given full responsibility, all our support from that aspect and what the club wants to do after that is not on me.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Newcastle and Nottingham Forest vs Arsenal - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates on a pivotal night in the title race
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of a critical night in the title race as Liverpool host Newcastle while Arsenal travel to the City Ground to take on Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Romano reveals FINAL Arsenal decision on signing Sterling permanently
arts.sum: Arsenal will not sign Raheem Sterling permanently in the summer, according to Fabrizio Romano. The former England international moved from West to North London last year, joining the Gunners on a season-long loan from Chelsea on Deadline Day.

arts.ttl: ‘He was amazing’: Gabriel Martinelli says he absolutely loves player Arsenal sold for £20m
